name: qywx-notifier-plus
description: 企业微信通知转发服务 - 类似Server酱的轻量级通知服务

scripts.build:frontend: tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i src/styles/tailwind.css -o public/app.css --minify && node scripts/build-frontend.js
scripts.test: npm run build:frontend && node --test --test-isolation=none test/backend-*.test.js test/frontend-*.test.js test/security.test.js test/review.test.js
scripts.test:isolated: npm run build:frontend && node --test test/backend-*.test.js test/frontend-*.test.js test/security.test.js test/review.test.js
